slides.title: DALP Platform Overview
slides.subtitle:
Digital Asset Lifecycle Management
March 2026 | SettleMint

slides.title: Platform Capabilities
slides.body:
The DALP platform provides comprehensive digital asset management across the entire lifecycle.

• Asset creation and issuance
• Lifecycle management
• Transfer and settlement
• Compliance monitoring
• Reporting and analytics

slides.title: Key Benefits
slides.col1:
For Issuers
• Simplified asset issuance
• Automated compliance
• Real-time visibility
• Reduced operational costs
slides.col2:
For Investors
• Secure asset custody
• Instant settlement
• Full transparency
• Regulatory compliance

slides.title: Two Column Simple
slides.col1:

slides.col2:

slides.title: Four Core Pillars
slides.item1:
Security
Enterprise-grade controls with role-based access, approvals, and governed release management for sensitive operations.
slides.item2:
Speed
Move from setup to launch faster because asset configuration, policy logic, and deployment steps stay connected.
slides.item3:
Compliance
Apply KYC, eligibility, and transfer restrictions systematically so regulated behavior does not rely on manual checks.
slides.item4:
Interoperability
Integrate existing systems through APIs, events, and structured workflows instead of rebuilding the operating model.
